title: SWELL Audit Recovery: Runtime Wiring, Validation, and Reliability
SWELL Audit Recovery: Runtime Wiring, Validation, and Reliability

message: Starting SWELL audit recovery mission from approved mission state with Phase A guardrail setup first

handoff.salientSummary: Phase A guardrail file already exists and is complete. All 3 Phase A assertions verified pass: VAL-PHASEA-001 (file exists), VAL-PHASEA-002 (encodes Tier 1 invariants), VAL-PHASEA-003 (all 5 blockers mapped). Validation-state.json updated.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: Verified that `crates/swell-integration-tests/tests/full_cycle_wiring.rs` is fully established with: 7 Tier 1 wiring assertions (wiring_daemon_holds_llm_backend, wiring_orchestrator_holds_execution_controller, wiring_full_cycle_task_reaches_done, wiring_validation_orchestrator_blocks_done_on_failure, wiring_task_runs_in_allocated_worktree, wiring_success_produces_branch_and_commit_trailer, wiring_post_tool_hooks_fire_during_execution), 3 negative path assertions, 2 Tier 2 preview stubs, and 2 witness tests that confirm current broken state. All assertions follow the loud invariant-oriented naming convention from doc 07. Updated validation-state.json to mark VAL-PHASEA-001/002/003 as 'pass'.

commandsRun.observation: 12 tests run: 2 witness tests pass (confirming broken state), 10 wiring tests correctly ignored pending Tier 1/2 implementation

tests.coverage: Phase A guardrail coverage: VAL-PHASEA-001 (file exists), VAL-PHASEA-002 (encodes Tier 1 invariants), VAL-PHASEA-003 (blocker-to-assertion mapping). Tier 1 wiring assertions: VAL-WIRING-001 through VAL-WIRING-005, VAL-CYCLE-001 through VAL-CYCLE-006, VAL-NEG-001 through VAL-NEG-003 all have named test coverage in full_cycle_wiring.rs.

handoff.salientSummary: Phasea-guardrails scrutiny validation complete. Synthesis: .factory/validation/phasea-guardrails/scrutiny/synthesis.json. No implementation features to review - only gatekeeper feature. Wiring guardrail tests pass (2 witness, 10 properly ignored). Full workspace test times out (environmental), individual crate tests pass.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: Scrutiny validation for phasea-guardrails milestone. Applied formatting fixes via cargo fmt to 6 files. Created synthesis report documenting: typecheck passes, clippy passes, wiring guardrails pass (2 witness tests green, 10 wiring_* tests properly ignored pending Tier 1), full workspace test suite times out at 600s (environmental issue), SWELL_TIMEOUT test pollution is pre-existing issue documented in prior validations.
handoff.whatWasLeftUndone: Full workspace test suite timeout (environmental constraint, not fixable by workers). Pre-existing SWELL_TIMEOUT test pollution (identified but not fixed in prior misc-fixes-3 validation).

commandsRun.observation: Clippy passes in 23.10s with no warnings
2 witness tests pass, 10 wiring_* tests properly ignored
Workspace test suite times out at 600s - environmental constraint

tests.coverage: No new tests added - this is a validation/synthesis task. Wiring guardrail tests already exist and pass.

discoveredIssues.description: Full workspace test suite times out at 600s - this is an environmental constraint, not a code issue. Individual crate tests pass.
Pre-existing SWELL_TIMEOUT env var test pollution in config tests causes intermittent failures when running workspace tests in parallel - documented in M9 and misc-fixes-3 validations but not fixed

message: Resume mission after phasea scrutiny; no new fix features needed because reported issues are pre-existing/non-blocking and phasea validation is satisfied

handoff.salientSummary: User testing validation for phasea-guardrails completed. All 3 Phase A assertions (VAL-PHASEA-001, VAL-PHASEA-002, VAL-PHASEA-003) verified as PASSED. Integration tests compile and run correctly with 2 witness tests passing and 10 wiring tests properly ignored pending Tier 1 implementation.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: User testing validation for phasea-guardrails milestone. Determined that all Phase A assertions are already validated (VAL-PHASEA-001, VAL-PHASEA-002, VAL-PHASEA-003 all pass). Ran `cargo test -p swell-integration-tests --test full_cycle_wiring` - 2 witness tests pass confirming current broken state (expected), 10 wiring tests properly ignored. Created synthesis report at .factory/validation/phasea-guardrails/user-testing/synthesis.json.
handoff.whatWasLeftUndone: Nothing - Phase A milestone has no pending assertions. Tier 1 implementation features will be validated when their features are completed.

commandsRun.observation: Test suite compiled and ran successfully. 2 witness tests passed (witness_daemon_does_not_depend_on_swell_llm, witness_orchestrator_does_not_hold_execution_controller), 10 wiring tests ignored (waiting for Tier 1 implementation).

tests.coverage: Phase A assertions verified via integration test compilation and execution. Phase A is guardrail establishment phase - no user-facing features to test via browser/CLI flows.

message: Continue mission after phasea user-testing validator; no follow-up fixes required because nothing was left undone and no issues were discovered
